title: The Sandstone Quarries of the Angkor Monuments in the Southeastern Foothills  of Kulen Mountain
highlights: The Angkor monuments in Cambodia were designated as a UNESCO World Heritage Cultural Site and consist of Buddhist or Hindu temples built mainly of sandstone and laterite.
